description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 3, 2025 at 12:18 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Burlingame, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on US 101 near Exit 420.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound in manual mode on US 101 in the fourth to the rightmost lane. A heavy truck was traveling 
in the adjacent right lane of the Waymo AV. As the Waymo AV passed the heavy truck the Waymo AV began shifting right, entering the 
lane occupied by the heavy truck, and the right side of the Waymo AV made contact with the left side of the heavy truck. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
